high_level_description: A graffiti-style urban mural on a textured concrete wall depicting a fox-girl character in a dynamic pose, surrounded by stylized spray-paint tag lettering and bold geometric shapes.

style_description.aesthetics: gritty urban street art, high-contrast, expressive line work, vibrant color pops against dark background
style_description.lighting: flat ambient light with slight warm directional fill from upper left, enhancing texture depth
style_description.art_style: graffiti mural, anime-influenced character design, bold outlines, urban spray-paint aesthetic

compositional_deconstruction.background: Rough weathered concrete wall with subtle horizontal staining and surface imperfections. Deep dark navy (#1B1B2F) as the primary fill, with faded overlapping circular spray bursts in muted tones creating depth. Light grunge texture throughout.

elements.desc: Fox-girl character in dynamic 3/4 pose facing left: fox ears with orange gradient tips, long silver hair, wearing a cropped hoodie with spray-can motif, baggy jogger pants, high-top sneakers. Right hand raised holding a spray can mid-action. Expressive wide eyes with teal irises. Anime-style proportions with graffiti-thick black outlines.
Large wildstyle graffiti tag in top-left corner. Letters interlocked with arrows, drips, and a star accent. Primary fill electric cyan with hot-pink outline and white highlight strokes.
Small stencil-style text in lower right. Clean blocky sans-serif caps. Off-white fill on dark background, subtle spray fade around edges.

Vertical stack of overlapping geometric shapes: diamond, triangle, circle. Each filled with one accent color from the palette and outlined in thick black. Functions as a decorative sidebar element balancing the composition.
Stylized spray-paint drips running vertically in the lower-left corner. Colors: electric cyan and lime green alternating. Semi-transparent, blending into the concrete texture.
